response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in senior software development, architecture, and leadership across diverse domains, including open-source projects, AI infrastructure, and high-performance systems. His technical breadth (Python, Linux, UML, etc.) aligns well with the role, though his German language proficiency is below the required C1 level. His open-source contributions and team mentorship further strengthen his candidacy for a Tech Lead position.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software architecture, leadership, and team mentorship across multiple industries
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux environments, and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Proven track record in rapid technical assessment, architectural design, and cross-functional project leadership
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', which falls short of the required C1 level for this role
Limited direct experience with UML modeling and requirements management, despite strong general architecture skills
Recent career gap (October 2025–Present) raises questions about current availability and focus
